extraction.one_line_summary: BODAR Maciej won Stage 20 ITT by 1 second over Kwiatkowski, while FROOME Chris extended GC lead from 23 to 54 seconds to clinch the Tour.
tactical_patterns: FROOME started 2min behind BARDET, used real-time visual gap confirmation to manage effort rather than pure time checks.
BARDET took excessive cornering risks on early chicanes knowing his TT weakness required offsetting danger with speed.
LANDA finished 15th in ITT despite domestique duties, positioning 1sec behind BARDET for podium via potential breakaway bonus sprints.
Team Sky deliberately paced FROOME conservatively on climb section to preserve descending speed rather than maximize climbing watts.

rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: pedaling through corners and unraveling on climb reveals GC contender cannot defend podium position in decisive ITTs
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: 15th place ITT while riding as domestique shows he conceded podium to team strategy not ability
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: rode 'not as hard as he could' on climb per commentary, suggesting Tour winner had significant power reserves
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: closed 100-point green jersey deficit in final week, indicating late-Tour form peak pattern
